notes: Page operations are patch operation variants only and do not apply document mutations directly.
Delete and rotate operations require non-empty page_indexes.
Rotate operations reject non-right-angle degrees before planning.
Highlight annotations require at least one non-empty rectangle.
Page operations inside a patch plan are mutating, full-rewrite, and unapproved by default.
Annotation operations inside a patch plan are mutating, incremental-append, and unapproved by default.
